jobDescription: Bird is a last-mile electric vehicle sharing company dedicated to bringing safe, low-cost, environmentally-friendly transportation solutions to communities across the world. We provide a fleet of electric, shared scooters that can be accessed via smartphone. Bird is headquartered in Venice, California and is rapidly expanding across the country and the world. Responsibilities: Work directly with IT systems engineers to architect and implement technologies with security best practices and defensive capabilities designed from the start Develop and implement system security configuration standards for end-user technologies and devices Develop tooling and automation to enable rapid security anomaly detection and response capabilities Work with various teams across Bird to ensure that all critical systems and workflows have effective and appropriate security controls in place Conduct infrastructure security reviews and scans to identify security vulnerabilities before we launch new features Design and implement automated security tests that can help identify issues proactively Investigate and handle security alerts, anomaly reports, and security incidents Configure and maintain systems to detect and prevent network intrusions and scan for vulnerabilities Work with huge amounts of data to detect and prevent attacks Qualifications: BS degree in Computer Science or related STEM field5+ years of experience in security engineering role focused on securing corporate networks and systems Experienced with securing or operating a Beyond Corp model environment Excellent understanding of cloud technology including SSO solutions and AWSExperienced with contributing security expertise to AD/ LDAP design and administration Experienced with operating endpoint protection solutions with a focus on enabling forensics Experienced with conducting forensics investigations on Windows, Linux, and OSXExperienced with MDM solutions Proficient with at least one scripting language, such as Python or Bash Technology we're working with: AWS, Terraform Google Suite JAMFActive Directory, LDAPOkta Saa S application management products MFA management products Bird Rides Inc. is an equal employment opportunity employer, and we welcome everyone regardless of their race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status or genetics. We are dedicated to providing an inclusive, open, and diverse work environment.
